base_rows.story:
He live in a small house with a red door.  
One morning, he wake up and see his key is not in the box.  
He look in all the room, but no key.  
He go to the garden and see a blue bird.  
The bird fly to the tree and sit on a chair.  
He ask the bird: "Do you know where my key is?"  
The bird say: "I see it in the wall."  
He run to the wall and find a small hole.  
He put his hand in and feel a cold thing.  
He pull it out and see a new key.  
He laugh and say: "This is not my key!"  
He go to the park and meet his friend.  
His friend say: "I found your key yesterday."  
He feel happy and go home.  
He know now that the key was in the box all the time.

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
He saw a mouse running in the garden.  
He wanted to catch the mouse, but the mouse was fast.  
The mouse ran into the house and hid under the table.  
The cat jumped and looked under the table.  
He found a red box with a key inside.  
He opened the box and saw a small blue book.  
The book had a word: "journey".  
He read it and felt happy.  
He knew the mouse had a journey to the castle.  
The castle was far, on a hill with a red roof.  
He asked the dog if he knew the way.  
The dog said, "No, but I saw a bird go to the castle."  
The cat said, "Then I will go on a journey to the castle."  
He walked with a small hat and a book.  
He went to the castle and found the mouse.  
They were friends and played together.  
The cat smiled and said, "We have a new story."

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
It was a cold morning and the sky was blue.  
A small dog ran into the garden and barked.  
He saw a red ball under the tree.  
He wanted to play with it.  
He jumped and caught the ball.  
He smiled and said, "Good day!"  
Then he saw a mouse with a long **whisker**.  
The mouse looked at him and said, "Hello!"  
He gave the mouse a piece of cheese.  
The mouse **whisked** his nose and ran away.  
He felt happy and went to the park.  
He saw a man with a big **umbrella**.  
The man said, "I need help!"  
He gave him a book and a piece of bread.  
They sat together and told a story.  
The sun came out and the day was warm.

The dog in the garden was very funny.  
He jump into the box and sit on top.  
He look at the cat and say, "I have a new name!"  
The cat say, "You are not brave!"  
But the dog stand up and run to the door.  
He find a red ball and start to play.  
He discover a small hole under the wall.  
He go in and see a mouse.  
He laugh and run out again.  
He want to play with the ball again.  
He go to the park and meet a friend.  
They play and eat cheese.  
The dog feel happy and warm.  
He know he is brave now.

The garden is quiet in the morning.  
A small red bird sits on a branch.  
She sees a mouse running near the wall.  
The mouse hides under a big stone.  
He looks at the stone and sees a small hole.  
A cat walks slowly and stops.  
She looks at the hole and sees a red ball.  
She thinks: "This is a mystery!"  
She asks the cat: "Do you know what it is?"  
The cat says: "I don’t know, but I feel it."  
They go to the garden door and open it.  
They find a box with a blue hat inside.  
The cat says: "This is not a mystery!"  
They laugh and sit on the chair.  
The sun comes out and the garden feels warm.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small red bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then the wind came and the box closed.  
I asked the cat: “Do you know what that was?”  
She said: “It was a new kind of adventure.”  
We all stood up and ran to the garden.  
We found a key under the table.  
We opened the door and saw a blue box.  
Inside, there was a book with a red hat.  
We read the story and felt happy.  
The night ended with a warm smile.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then, a red hat appeared on the floor.  
We did not know who put it there.  
A wizard stood in the hall with a big book.  
He said, “I found a magic key in the wall.”  
We all ran to the door and looked inside.  
The key opened a secret room behind the wall.  
In the room, there was a blue fish and a red chair.  
We sat down and told a story about the bird.  
The wizard smiled and said, “That was a good story.”  
We all felt happy and warm.  
The night ended with a quiet smile.

I live in a small house with a garden.  
Every morning, I go to the garden and see a red bird.  
The bird sits on a tree and sings a happy song.  
I ask the bird, "What is your name?"  
He says, "I am Tom."  
Tom is a funny bird with a blue hat.  
We play together in the garden.  
We jump, run, and hide behind the wall.  
One day, Tom says, "Let’s go on an adventure!"  
I say, "An adventure?" I don’t know what that means.  
Tom shows me a box with a key inside.  
He says, "This key opens a secret door."  
We go into the door and find a small room.  
In the room, we see a red chair and a book.  
We sit and read the book.  
We laugh and feel happy.  
Tom says, "We will go on many adventures again."

The boy found a key in the garden.  
He looked in the basket and saw a red ball.  
He went to the house and asked the cat.  
The cat said, "That key is for the castle."  
He ran to the castle and saw a big door.  
The door was closed and locked.  
He tried to open it with the key.  
But the key did not fit.  
He sat on the floor and felt sad.  
Then he saw a small bird in the tree.  
The bird said, "Look! The key is in your hand!"  
He looked again and saw the key in his basket.  
He smiled and went home.  
He told his friend about the castle and the key.  
They played in the garden and found more keys.

A small cat named Miso lived in a quiet house.  
He liked to sit by the window and watch birds.  
One morning, he saw a red ball in the garden.  
He asked the dog, "Do you know who dropped it?"  
The dog said, "I don’t know, but it looks like a creature."  
Miso felt surprised. He had never heard that word before.  
He looked around and saw a small hole in the wall.  
He thought, "Maybe a creature hid there."  
He went to the garden and found a tiny mouse.  
The mouse looked sad and had a blue hat.  
Miso said, "You are not a creature. You are a friend."  
The mouse smiled and said, "I lost my food."  
Miso gave him a piece of cheese.  
They sat together and told a story about the red ball.  
Miso felt happy and knew he had a new friend.

A blue bird lived in a big tree.  
He liked to sit on a branch and watch the garden.  
One morning, he saw a small mouse hiding under the floor.  
He wanted to help, so he whispered, "Don’t be afraid!"  
The mouse jumped up and ran away.  
The bird felt sad because he had not seen the mouse again.  
He asked the wind, "Do you know where the mouse went?"  
The wind said, "I heard a secret in the garden."  
He looked around and saw a red box with a key.  
He thought, "Maybe the mouse hid inside."  
He went to the box and opened it.  
Inside, he found a book with a secret word.  
He read it and smiled.  
He knew the mouse was safe.  
Now, every day, he whispers to the tree, "I love you."

It was a rainy day. The rain fell loud and cold. I sat on the chair and read a book. The window was wet and blue. A cat jumped on the table. She looked at me and smiled. I asked her, "Do you like rain?" She said, "Yes, it is quiet." I felt happy. I put a basket on the floor. The basket was full of food. I saw a small bird in the tree. It looked sad. I gave it a piece of cheese. The bird jumped and flew away. I felt warm and happy. The rain stopped and the sun came out. We all went to the garden. We played with a red ball. The day was not bad at all.

tuned_rows.story:
I need my key, but I do not have it now.

I start a journey to find it. A long walk from home to home.

My journey begins at the door of my old house.

I look on the table, on the floor, and in the box, but I do not see the key.

I ask my friend, and she tell me her cat like a bird. She call him Blue.

Blue is not here, but I hear him in the garden, so I go out into the park to find him.

My journey take me to the green garden and the big tree.

There, I see Blue sit on the chair, and in his hand, there is the key!

I feel very happy, and I give him some food. He love the fish and the cheese.

We all laugh, and the dog and the mouse run and jump too.

This small journey make us all warm and kind.

I think: one day, I will not hide the key in the cat's hat again.

Cat Detective Blue live in a small house on a green street. One day, a friend come to her door and say, "I need help!". She ask, "What do you have?" Her friend give her a old key and a funny book. "This key open a big castle," the book say. Blue want to find the castle, so she start a journey into the park and out into the garden. A journey like this need a kind cat and some good food. Blue eat some fish and then run quick to a big tree. There, she find a red hat and a blue box close to the wall. She open the box and see a small mouse in it. The mouse tell her a story of a cold night in the old castle. Blue and the mouse go up, up, up, and they find the castle at the end of the day. The castle is big and loud and very old. Inside, they see a door with a bird on it. Blue catch the bird, and the door open. There, they get more food and a warm room. Blue smile, sit on a chair, and they all sleep, happy and hungry, in the old castle.

I live in a small house on a green street. One day, I see a big cat at the door. He has a funny hat and a red umbrella. The umbrella is not for rain. It is for the sun! The cat is very hungry, and he wants to eat some food. I open the door and say, "Come in, friend!" He has two big whiskers. They go from his eye to his nose. His whiskers help him find food and hide in the dark. I give him some cheese and a small fish. He is happy and he sit on my chair. Then I hear a loud bird in the garden. The cat run to the window to look. His big whiskers go up and down, and he is very quick. I laugh and call him "Whiskers". We play and read a book in the warm room. He is not sad or slow or bad. He is a good new friend!

Bingo is a funny dog. He live in a small house with a green garden. One day, Bingo do not find his food and he start to feel very hungry. He look at the door, then he look at the window, but he need more food. Bingo is brave. When the cat come close to his food, he run quick to the table and say "no!" The cat is sad, but Bingo smile and eat his food. He is brave again in the morning when the rain come into the room. He jump up and get a big red hat to hide his small head. One day, Bingo walk out into the park and he discover a new bird in a old tree. He has not see this bird before, and he is very happy to discover it. He sit down and look at the bird with two big eyes. The bird look at him too, and they stand there, quiet and good, like friends. Bingo tell his friend, a old cat, the story of his new bird find. The cat laugh and say, "I love that funny dog, Bingo!"

The garden is quiet and green in the morning sun.

A small cat sits on the old chair and looks at the bird in the tree.

The cat has two big eyes and one funny whisker that goes up and down.

His whisker is very quick, and it helps him feel where the food is.

The cat is hungry, but he do not know where the food is now.

Then he see a red box close to the wall, and his whisker go to the box.

His whisker find the key on the floor of the box!

The cat is very happy, and he run to his friend the dog to tell him the story.

The dog sit down and say, "I like this mystery. Who hide the cheese here?"

A mystery is when you do not know, and you want to find the answer.

The cat and the dog laugh, for the mystery is not a bad story at all.

They open the box and find more food, and they eat it in the warm garden.

The rain come down, and the cat go to sleep in his old chair.

The dog read a book by the window, and they feel very good and kind.

In the morning, the cat wake up with a big smile, for the garden is home.

The old house on the green street is very big and very cold at night.

Two friends, I and my dog, go in to find a key.

We do not know the story of this old house, but we start to feel like we have a new adventure.

An adventure is when you go out into the unknown and find something good or funny.

We look in the room, we look on the table, we look on the floor.

Then I hear a loud bird and I run to the window, but the bird is not here.

We sit down on the old chair and read a book to stop the cold.

In the book, a cat and a mouse have a big adventure in the park.

I ask my dog to help me find the key, and he is very quick.

Then we hear a funny sound at the door, and we stop and look.

No one is at the door, but we still feel that this is a good adventure.

We get some food. Cheese and fish and blue and red food. And we eat.

The old house is warm now, and we sleep very slow and happy.

In the morning, we open the door and run out into the sun.

The old house on the green street is very quiet at night.

A small cat sits on the floor and looks at the wall.

In a big room, there is an old book and a funny hat. This is a wizard's hat.

The wizard is not here now, but his book is on the table.

A dog runs into the room and finds the wizard's hat. He wants to hide it.

The cat and the dog look at the hat. They do not know the wizard.

The wizard was a good friend. He loved to help and tell new story words.

One day, the wizard and the dog go out to the garden to find food.

They get some fish and cheese, and the wizard is very happy.

But then the rain comes down, and the wizard needs a warm home.

So the two of them run quick and quiet into the old house.

The dog sits down on the old chair, and the wizard reads his book by the blue light.

They eat, they sleep, and they feel warm and good.

In the morning, the wizard and the dog open the door and go out to the park.

The dog is sad to see the old house again, but the wizard smiles and says, "We come here when we need help."

I live in a small house on a green street. One day, I see a new cat at the door. He has one big eye and a funny hat. I ask him his name, and he says "Blue". Blue and I go out into the park to find a good adventure. We run, we jump, we catch a bird, and we laugh and laugh! It is a very good adventure. Blue tell me a story of an old dog and a red box. Then we walk to the garden and look for food. I find some fish and give it to Blue. He is so happy. We sit on a chair and eat in the warm sun. Blue is not sad or slow or quiet. He is kind and funny, and he love this adventure too! Now I know that a new friend is the best adventure of all.

The old castle is big and cold. A small key is not in its room. The key is not on the table. The key is not in the box. A cat live in the castle and she have a basket. The basket is red and blue and green. The cat sit in her basket and she look out the window. The key is not in the basket. The cat ask her friend, a bird, for help. The bird say the key is in the garden. They run out the door and into the park. They look at the tree, they look at the wall, they look at the floor. Then the dog find the key! The dog is very good and quick. The cat and the bird laugh and smile. The key is here, and the castle is warm again. A lost day can be a good day too.

Cat detective Blue has two big eyes and a very old hat.

One day, a small mouse come to her door and say, "Help! I need food!"

Blue look at him and ask, "Do you know a new creature that live in this house?"

A creature is a funny, old word for a new kind of animal.

Blue walk into the room and see a big red box on the table.

Then she find a key in a blue book, and she think, "This is a good creature to open a box!"

She use the key and the box open, and there is some fish and cheese in it!

The mouse is very happy and eat the food quick.

But then Blue see a dog in the garden, and the dog have a bird in his hand!

Blue run out, and the dog and the bird run and jump, and Blue laugh and smile.

She tell the mouse, "A dog and a bird like to catch small creatures in the park!"

The mouse sit down and feel warm and good in the sun.

Blue and the mouse read a new story and sleep, and the cat detective go to work again the next morning.

There is a big tree in the garden. A small blue bird lives in the tree. The bird and the tree are good friends. One day, the bird tells the tree a secret. A very, very quiet secret that no one can hear. The tree says, "I do not know your secret, but I love you." The bird smiles and sits in the tree. At night, the bird and the tree hear the rain on the old green wall. The rain is loud, but the bird makes a funny sound, like a whisper. A quiet word that is too small to hear. The tree likes this whisper and feels warm. In the morning, the bird finds some food on the floor of the garden. She gives the tree a big smile. The tree is happy, and the bird is hungry. They sit close and eat. The bird asks the tree, "Do you have a secret too?" The tree is slow, but he starts to tell a new story. They laugh and feel good. Now they sleep, and the rain is quiet again.

The rain comes down all morning. It is a very quiet, silent day. No loud birds, no funny dogs, no one walk in the street. The rain is silent on the window. A small cat sits at the door and looks out. She has a basket by her. A big, old basket with a red and blue hat on it. The cat puts some fish into the basket. She wants to give the fish to a bird in the tree. But the rain is cold and the day is silent, so the bird does not come down. The cat is sad, but she is kind, so she gives the fish to a mouse too. The mouse is happy. Now the cat and the mouse eat. The rain is silent again, and they do not hear the dog run to the park. The cat and the mouse close their basket and go to sleep. The dog is hungry and he needs help. He calls out, but no one is here to hear him. Then the cat opens her basket and the dog is very, very happy. They all eat cheese and read a good story. The rain is silent, and the day is warm and good.
